jobs.title: EE Hardware System Engineer
jobs.description:
**About Etched**


Etched is building hardware for frontier intelligence. Co\-designing chips, racks, software, and manufacturing to deliver best\-in\-class throughput and latency across both prefill and decode workloads. Our first products are heavily focused on **inference**. Backed by hundreds of millions from top\-tier investors and staffed by leading engineers, Etched is redefining the infrastructure layer for the fastest growing industry in history.

**Job Summary**


Etched is looking for exceptional hardware system engineers to join our team. The candidate will be responsible for schematic design for our accelerator module, and will help us pave the way for manufacturing scale.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead board development for Etched’s accelerator systems
* Work with Signal Integrity, PCB, and Mechanical Engineering to solve system level design problems
* Collaborate with ODMs/OEMs on system requirements, including bringup and validation plans
* Understand datacenter customer requirements and ensure our servers meet them
* Bring up of system base board and mezzanine card
* Create and manage PCBA documentation including BOMs and special assembly processes
* Define test plans and test equipment for bring\-up and manufacturing

**You may be a good fit if you have (Must\-have qualifications)**

* 5\-10 years of experience in complex server/switch system design and development
* Extensive experience on 100G Ethernet, PCIe Gen5, I2C, SPI, UART interfaces
* Familiar with modern AI/datacenter system architecture
* Proven track record of designing systems alongside silicon
* Deep understanding of datacenter needs, especially with respect to high power (\>10 kW) AI servers

**Benefits**

* Competitive compensation packages, including generous equity packages
* Comprehensive insurance coverage and other top\-of\-market benefits

**How We’re Different**


Etched believes in the Bitter Lesson. We are the first inference\-focused frontier AI system, betting early on

jobs.title: Manufacturing Test Development Engineer
jobs.description:
Google welcomes people with disabilities.

### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in manufacturing or test engineering.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* Master's degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
* 8 years of experience in Test Engineering.
* Experience in custom test hardware design, fixtures, instrumentation, and station bring\-up, and in Advanced Python, Bash, and Shell scripting for test automation across Linux.
* Experience in DFT, System\-Level Testing (L6/L10/L11\), GR\&R, calibration, and correlation, and collaborating with CMs, OEMs, JDMs, and ODMs.
* Ability to travel upto 15% internationally.
* Strong background in functional testing for server, storage, and networking products, including air/liquid cooling and RMA/Failure Analysis.

**About the job**
-----------------


Be part of a team that pushes boundaries, developing custom silicon solutions that power the future of Google's direct\-to\-consumer products. You'll contribute to the innovation behind products loved by millions worldwide. Your expertise will shape the next generation of hardware experiences, delivering unparalleled performance, efficiency, and integration.

In this role you will be responsible for the deployment of capacity in Google’s Fleet. You will lead cross\-functional program planning and execution to deliver next generation systems from Concept to End of Life (EOL), with operational excellence and speed. As part of this team, your test solutions are fundamental to enabling the rapid and reliable scaling of Google's Artificial Intelligence (AI) infrastructure.  

  

In the Product and Test Engineering team, we're proud to be our engineers' engineers. We grow on the tests of solving complex test problems, ensuring that designs transition successfully into high\-volume manufacturing, and maki

jobs.title: Binance Accelerator Program - Full Stack Engineer (AI)
jobs.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. Binance is trusted by more than 320 million people in 100\+ countries for its industry\-leading security, transparency, trading engine speed, protections for investors, and unmatched portfolio of digital asset products and offerings from trading and finance to education, research, social good, payments, institutional services, and Web3 features. Binance is devoted to building an inclusive crypto ecosystem to increase the freedom of money and financial access for people around the world with crypto as the fundamental means.

**About Binance Accelerator Program**
Binance Accelerator Program (BAP) is a 3\-6 month internship program designed for Early Career talent to have firsthand experience in the rapidly expanding digital assets space. You will be given the opportunity to develop your skills at Binance and understand what it’s like to work at the world's leading blockchain ecosystem. As part of your internship in the BAP, there will also be opportunities for networking and development, which will expand your professional network and build transferable skills to propel you forward in your career. Learn about the BAP Program HERE.

**Who may apply**
Current university students and recent graduates.
* *Terms of employment / engagement shall be subject to contract and local applicable laws*



### **Responsibilities**


* Participate in end\-to\-end development of product features across frontend and backend under the guidance of senior engineers
* Learn and integrate mainstream AI coding tools (e.g., Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code) into your daily development workflow
* Assist in translating product requirements into working implementations with reduced handoff friction between frontend and backend
* Act as a full stack "seed learner" within the team — absorb full stack practices, contribute ideas, and grow into an autonomously deliv

Launch your career with purpose—join us in shaping the future of digital innovation.

jobs.title: Data Scientist - AI/ML
jobs.description:
Designs, develops and maintains software products. Analyzes requirements and develops innovative, useful software solutions for customers. Modifies existing software products to add new functionality, adapt to new hardware, improve performance or enhance usability. May participate in all aspects of development from detailed programming to high\-level system design.


**Nordson Test \& Inspection** , a leading provider of advanced inspection and testing solutions, is seeking a highly motivated and talented **Data Scientist for generative AI** to join our team in **Eckental, Germany** . We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace, and we are looking for candidates who share that same commitment.


**Summary of the role**

In your role as AI Software Engineer Intern your aim is to support the AI team in building solutions and take over engineering tasks within the team.


This role involves a lot of learning and the ability to learn fast in a domain which is evolving all the time.  

  



As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where your ideas and contributions will be valued and respected.


**Role and Responsibilities**

* Collaborate with fellow engineers to create an AI solution in the domain of computer vision
* The role involves coding in python.
* Investigate data provided by the AI team and find patterns in it.
* Report results of the exploration within the dataset to the team lead and create a report.
* Utilize libraries like, PyTorch, Tensorflow, Sci\-Kit learn and Pandas.

**Skills and Qualifications**

* PhD/Masters in related field and experience with generative AI
* Experience in computer vision
* Software Skills in Python
* Knowledge in Generative AI
* Knowledge in statistics and math which are necessary to work in the field of AI
* Interest to the domain and be an active member of the team
* Having the will to integrate in an international team which might need to ad

jobs.title: Senior Mask Design Engineer - Hardware
jobs.description:
NVIDIA has continuously reinvented itself over two decades. Our invention of the GPU in 1999 sparked the growth of the PC gaming market, redefined modern computer graphics, and revolutionized parallel computing. More recently, GPU deep learning ignited modern AI — the next era of computing. NVIDIA is a “learning machine” that constantly evolves by adapting to new opportunities that are hard to take on, that only we can pursue, and that matter to the world. This is our life’s work, to amplify human creativity and intelligence. We would love to hear from you!


We are looking for a Senior Mask Layout Design Engineer, someone who is excited to join a growing and dynamic group of diverse individuals responsible for contributing to our latest generation chiplet interface projects

**What you'll be doing:**

* Performing physical layout for mixed\-signal functions like top level, high speed datapaths and high\-speed clocking designs in state\-of\-the\-art sub\-micron CMOS technologies using Cadence tools.
* You'll work closely with mixed\-signal design engineers to customize designs for integration in VLSI products.
* Take part in floor planning, custom layout and verifying against design rules and schematics.

**What we need to see:**

* Have a BSEE or equivalent experience. Minimum of 5\+ years industry experience in Mask and Layout Design.
* Working independently on creating layout with excellent quality
* Deep understanding and previous experience for FinFET technology is a must
* You are an authority with Cadence custom circuit design tools \- particularly virtuoso.
* Able to handle fast\-paced project and iterate quickly based on designer’s feedback
* You can work effectively in a team, good interpersonal skills, enthusiasm, and positive energy.
* Scripting languages like perl, python, skill etc.is a plus
* Should have knowledge of DRC and LVS checking flows, ability to customize decks.


\#LI\-Hybrid

jobs.title: Hardware Engineer, Power
jobs.description:
Meta’s mission is backed by a massive hardware infrastructure. Our computational challenges are big, complex, and consistently evolving. Your work has the potential to shape the compute hardware and AI hardware going into our large\-scale data centers affecting billions of users. Meta is seeking a motivated Power Engineer to join our Power Systems team.Our team is responsible for designing rack power solutions covering in\-rack AC/DC and DC/DC, to support our fast\-growing infrastructure at scale. Internally, we work closely with cross\-functional teams to define the most efficient power hardware system, and to optimize for data center deployment. Externally, we work closely with industry partners, driving through the design cycle from beginning to end, ensuring high\-quality product delivery. Our designs have been contributed to the Open Compute Project.  

  

  

### **Hardware Engineer, Power Responsibilities:**

* Define and design rack\-level power systems to enable the integration of a variety of IT gear into Meta's data centers
* Work with cross\-functional teams to drive product qualification for full test coverage to meet product requirements and ensure product deployment
* Review and drive the product development with external power vendors, including in\-depth design review, thorough test report review, and manufacturing test coverage review. Create verification test cases as needed
* Review circuit/PCB design, calculations, and simulation
* Review and check the test report and the bug report
* Review and check manufacturing test coverage and report
* Execute troubleshooting and resolution for product operation issues in the field
* Contribute to rack\-level power system solution roadmap with cross\-functional teams and vendor partners to ensure long\-term scalability of Meta power infrastructure

  

  

  

### **Minimum Qualifications:**

* B.S. in Electrical Engineering or Power Electronics
* 6\+ years of experience in power supply design
* 6\+ years

jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer- Security Cyberdefender
jobs.description:
**Overview**  

With more than 45,000 employees and partners worldwide, the Customer Experience and Success (CE\&S) organization is on a mission to empower customers to accelerate business value through differentiated customer experiences that leverage Microsoft’s products and services, ignited by our people and culture. We drive cross\-company alignment and execution, ensuring that we consistently exceed customers’ expectations in every interaction, whether in\-product, digital, or human\-centered. CE\&S is responsible for all up services across the company, including consulting, customer success, and support across Microsoft’s portfolio of solutions and products. Join CE\&S and help us accelerate AI transformation for our customers and the world.


Within CE\&S, the Customer Service \& Support (CSS) organization builds trust and confidence for every person and organization through delivering a seamless support experience. In CSS, we are powered by Microsoft’s AI technology to help consumers, businesses, partners, and more, resolve their issues quickly and securely, helping prevent future problems from occurring and achieving more from their Microsoft investment.


In the Customer Service \& Support (CSS) team we are looking for people with a passion for delivering customer success. As a Technical Support Engineer, you will own, troubleshoot, and solve customers’ technical issues. This opportunity will allow you to accelerate your career growth, hone your problem\-solving, collaboration and research skills, and develop your technical proficiency.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

jobs.title: Generative AI Research Intern
jobs.description:
**About Appier**
----------------



Appier is a software\-as\-a\-service (SaaS) company that uses artificial intelligence (AI) to power business decision\-making. Founded in 2012 with a vision of democratizing AI, Appier's mission is turning AI into ROI by making software intelligent. Appier now has 17 offices across APAC, Europe and U.S., and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange (Ticker number: 4180\). Visit www.appier.com for more information.


**About the Role**
------------------



As a Research Scientist, you will work at the frontier of generative and agentic AI: advancing **Large Language Models (LLMs)**, **Vision\-Language Models (VLMs)**, and **AI agents** that reason, plan, and use tools to solve real\-world problems. Your research will span post\-training (SFT, RLHF/RLVR), reasoning and test\-time scaling, multimodal intelligence, and autonomous agentic systems. You will shape Appier's core AI capabilities, publish at top AI/ML conferences, and collaborate with scientists and engineers to turn frontier research into product impact.


**Responsibilities**
--------------------


* Research and build **agentic AI systems**: reasoning, planning, tool use, memory, and multi\-agent collaboration, powered by LLMs and VLMs.
* Advance **post\-training techniques** (SFT, RLHF, RL with verifiable rewards, preference optimization) to improve model capability, alignment, and reliability.
* Improve the performance, efficiency, and scalability of foundation models across training, inference, and test\-time compute.
* Design rigorous **evaluations and benchmarks** for models and agents in real\-world scenarios.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ship research into production applications.
* Track frontier research, propose new directions, and publish key findings at leading AI/ML venues.

**About You**
-------------


### **Minimum Qualifications**


* Master's degree or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field, wi

jobs.title: React Frontend Engineer, BigPay (Fully Remote)
jobs.description:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300\+ million people in 100\+ countries for our industry\-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital\-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.  

We are looking for a **Frontend Engineer (React)** to join the **Binance BigPay** team. You will build intuitive, secure, and high\-performance payment experiences used by customers globally. Working closely with product managers, designers, backend engineers, and cross\-functional teams, you will deliver scalable web applications while solving complex engineering challenges in a fast\-paced fintech environment.



This is a **100% remote, work\-from\-home** opportunity.



### **Responsibilities**


* Build **high\-performance, scalable, and user\-centric** web applications using **React** and **TypeScript**.
* Develop intuitive payment experiences for both desktop and mobile web platforms.
* Design reusable UI components and contribute to shared frontend libraries to improve engineering efficiency and maintainability.
* Collaborate closely with backend engineers, product managers, designers, and QA to deliver high\-quality product features.
* Optimize application performance through modern frontend techniques such as code splitting, lazy loading, caching, and rendering optimization.
* Drive engineering best practices including code quality, testing, accessibility, and frontend architecture.
* Participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and contribute to the evolution of the frontend platform.

工作穩定，尋找有責任心且細心的夥伴!
1\.核對資料是否正確、登打，簡單易學，需熟悉電腦鍵盤操作(英、數輸入)。
2\.維護辦公室環境與設備之整潔。
3\.具備基礎文書處理能力。
4\.協助簡單的辦公業務。
5\.配合公司交付之工作內容及輪調。
6\.需長時間坐著使用電腦。
7\.邏輯能力好，能與其他夥伴互相配合、負責任的工作態度。
8\.非常歡迎應屆畢業生。
**職缺資訊**
--------


薪資待遇
月薪 30,000 元以上 (薪資依經驗資歷及績效核薪)
支薪方式
匯款
發薪資日
每月5日
上班地點
台北市大同區南京西路406號7樓 地圖
\#捷運北門站走路6分鐘
上班時段
晚班 / 12:00\-21:00
休假制度
週休二日
職務類別
行政人員 、行政助理 、資料輸入人員
**職缺條件**
--------


工作性質
全職
工作經驗
不拘
需求人數
3人
可上班日
不限
管理責任
不需負擔管理責任
是否出差
不需出差/外派
**技能條件**
--------


教育程度
高中職
電腦專長
Word、Excel
**全新功能「技能交換」**
**用你會的，換你想學的技能**
**核音**
**擅長** **19** **個技能**
腳本編寫


APP開發


手機遊戲


電腦應用相關


基本操作技能


網路資訊應用


AI應用技巧


ChatGPT


網頁前端


目前以遊戲直播為主，並持續投入 iOS 直播推流應用開發。對直播技術、影音串流、AI 輔助開發、內容創作與產品設計有濃厚興趣，持續透過實作累積經驗，也會學習 Godot 遊戲開發、音樂創作與編曲等相關技術。 希望透過技能交換認識不同背景的夥伴，交流開發經驗、Side Project、AI 工作流程與職涯發展。只要彼此感興趣、能互相學習，基本上不太侷限領域，都很歡迎交流與技能交換，包括程式開發、設計、美術、Cosplay、造型、化妝、攝影、影音製作、音樂創作等不同方向的經驗分享。
**Anitta**
**擅長** **3** **個技能**
英文


手繪


電腦繪圖


英文家教經驗約10年 多益金 915 全美教學 想找在台中的繪友一起畫聚 最近在玩油畫棒和丙烯筆 咖啡廳或戶外寫生皆可 另徵一起練hiphop腳步的朋友 （我目前學舞2年 想開始好好練基礎）
**Ben單板水肺教練**

籃球和重量訓練是我熱愛的領域，身體保養更是日常必修課。希望能找到同樣對重量訓練有興趣的人，一起交換心得與技巧。此外，對脈輪的調理也抱持好奇，想藉由交流深化理解。期待透過技能共享，不僅提升身體素質，也讓自我調整更加全面與精準。若你也熱愛成長且願意分享經驗，十分歡迎與我聯繫。

jobs.title: uniopen TEAM - TEAM 經理
jobs.description:
公司名稱： 統一超商
  

部 門： 數位產品運營部 uniopenTEAM
  

職位名稱： uniopen TEAM \- TEAM 經理
  

工作地點： 台北市
  

  

薪資待遇： 面議 ()  

  

  

工作內容： - uniopen 品牌經營與行銷推廣：整合集團關係企業資源，規劃並執行 uniopen 品牌對外宣傳策略，經營官方平台(含網站與 App)，提升品牌知名度與會員信任度。
  

- 官網與App內容規劃與運營：制定網站內容與流量成長策略，分析流量與用戶行為數據，依成效調整推廣策略與資源配置。
  

- uniopen 集團會員經營管理：規劃會員經營策略，掌握會員生命週期與分群經營，提升會員註冊、活躍度與黏著度，強化會員權益與集團資源整合，帶動會員價值成長。
  

- 行銷預算管理與成效分析：負責年度行銷預算編列、審核與掌控，確保資源有效配置；建立各項行銷活動與專案之成效評估指標，定期分析並提出優化建議。
  

- 團隊管理與領導：召募、培訓與指導團隊成員，訂定績效指標並定期評估，管理行銷預算，跨部門協調確保業務目標一致。
  

- 跨部門協調與主管交辦事項，作為集團內外部溝通協調的窗口。
  

  

條件要求： 學歷：大學以上，行銷、大眾傳播、數位媒體相關系所優先，碩士加分。  

經歷：數位行銷相關經驗 10 年以上；具品牌 / 會員營運、內容行銷、社群經營、網站流量成長經驗者優先。  

  

具數位行銷策略規劃、數據分析（流量/用戶行為）、數位產品營運、預算管理能力。  

需積極主動、責任感強、具創意與表達能力。  

具備跨集團溝通協調能力：能有效協調集團內外部關係企業等多方資源，推動跨部門合作以達成業務目標。  

  

  

應徵方式：
  

  

備 註： 合則約談，不合恕不另行通知  

  

  

* 本職缺刊登與【104人力銀行】同步，若您在104人力銀行已有完整的履歷資料，


建議可至104人力銀行投遞，以節省您寶貴時間，謝謝。

jobs.title: 商品管理行政
jobs.description:
公司名稱： 統一生活事業股份有限公司（康是美）


部 門： 商品部 商品管理TEAM


職位名稱： 商品管理行政


工作地點： 台北市


薪資待遇： 月薪 33673元 \~ 33673元


工作內容： 1\.資料建檔：針對公司營運相關之各項資料進行建檔，包含供應商及活動相關進行建檔作業。  

2\.數據分析：異常檢視，優化作業流程。  

3\.帳務作業管理。


條件要求： 1\.熟悉office軟體工具(Word/Excel/Powerpoint)。  

2\.態度認真、細心、邏輯思考佳。  

3\.能獨立作業、並具跨部門溝通執行能力。  

4\.高中(含)以上畢業，不限科系。


應徵方式：


備 註： 合則約談，不合恕不另行通知


* 本職缺刊登與【104人力銀行】同步，若您在104人力銀行已有完整的履歷資料，


建議可至104人力銀行投遞，以節省您寶貴時間，謝謝。

jobs.title: Senior Lead Industry Manager (Growth)
jobs.description:
**About Pinterest:**



Millions of people around the world come to our platform to find creative ideas, dream about new possibilities and plan for memories that will last a lifetime. At Pinterest, we're on a mission to bring everyone the inspiration to create a life they love, and that starts with the people behind the product.



Discover a career where you ignite innovation for millions, transform passion into growth opportunities, celebrate each other's unique experiences and embrace the flexibility to do your best work. Creating a career you love? It's Possible.



At Pinterest, AI isn't just a feature, it's a powerful partner that augments our creativity and amplifies our impact, and we're looking for candidates who are excited to be a part of that. To get a complete picture of your experience and abilities, we'll explore your foundational skills and how you collaborate with AI.



Through our interview process, what matters most is that you can always explain your approach, showing us not just what you know, but how you think. You can read more about our AI interview philosophy and how we use AI in our recruiting process here.


We are looking for a Senior Lead Industry Manager in our Singapore\-based Greater China Export Sales Team. This person will oversee an explosive growth opportunity in the Greater China Region with a unique potential for sustained global impact. This role will report directly to the Director of Sales for the Greater China Region.


**What you'll do:**


* Lead, coach, and develop a sizable team of Client Account Managers focused on torso export advertisers to deliver against quarterly revenue, retention, and advertiser growth targets for Greater China Region (GCR).
* Own the torso export advertiser book of business for Greater China (excluding top key accounts), ensuring coverage, depth, and scalable service levels.
* Be the expert in Pinterest's ads solutions for export advertisers, with a strong focus on performance and lower funnel

This person will oversee an explosive growth opportunity in the Greater China Region with a unique potential for sustained global impact. This role will report directly to the Director of Sales for the Greater China Region.


**What you'll do:**


* Lead and grow the scaled segment to deliver against quarterly revenue, retention, and advertiser growth targets for Greater China Region (GCR).
* Own the scaled coverage model for scaled business (SMB)—define segmentation, service levels, account assignment, capacity planning, and operating cadence to maximize ROI and consistent execution at scale.
* Serve as one of the primary senior point of contacts for key GCR agencies and channel partners supporting Scaled business; build and deepen exe

jobs.title: Facebook線上課程廣告貼文製作與發佈
jobs.description:
**工作內容**
更新日期:2026\-07\-21
--------------------------

關於我們 


我們是一個全新的高端手搖飲品牌，即將於今年 8 月在台北東區精華地段隆重登場！
我們對兩件事極致狂熱：調配出最完美的海鹽焦糖珍奶，以及為我們的社群創造超棒的體驗。透過引進自動化萃茶技術，我們能確保每一杯茶的品質始終如一，這也讓我們有更多時間專注在最重要的事情上——與我們的顧客互動。
我們正在打造一個充滿活力、親切且熱愛生活品味的團隊。如果你總是能量滿滿、喜歡用笑容感染他人，並且想從第一天起就加入一個有趣、快速成長的品牌，你絕對會愛上這裡！
工作內容 
製作極致飲品： 學習我們招牌海鹽焦糖系列飲品的獨家配方，操作自動化設備，調配出高品質、高穩定度的美味飲品。
散播歡樂氛圍： 將你的溫暖與活力帶到第一線！親切迎接顧客、協助點餐，讓我們的店面成為東區最有人情味的角落。
維持流暢營運： 與優秀的團隊夥伴齊心協力，負責每日的開店準備、流暢的收店流程，並維持櫃台的整潔與溫馨氛圍。
把關完美品質： 時刻關注食材的新鮮度與庫存（落實先進先出 FIFO 原則！），確保我們送出去的每一杯飲料都是無懈可擊的完美之作。
我們在尋找這樣的你 
擁有經驗且渴望學習： 你曾有手搖飲店、咖啡廳或餐飲業的工作經驗，熟悉基本操作，但對於學習全新、現代化的營運模式感到興奮。
天生親切： 你擁有陽光、外向的個性，真心喜歡與人互動交流，並熱衷於為顧客帶來美好的一天。
團隊合作夥伴： 你喜歡充滿活力、互相協作的工作環境，隨時準備好伸出援手支持隊友。
國際化視野： 能以英文進行基本溝通，讓來自世界各地的國際旅客感受到賓至如歸的溫暖。
成長思維： 你做事可靠、有抱負，並渴望跟著我們品牌一起成長與開疆闢土！
你的福利待遇 
基本薪資： 月薪 NT$ 36,000起。
獎金制度： 業績制度及年終獎金
職涯成長空間： 我們非常重視內部晉升！身為創始團隊的一員，你將擁有晉升未來管理職的優先權。
貼心保障與福利： 依法享有勞健保與勞退新制、每日免費員工飲料，以及不定期舉辦的歡樂團隊聚餐。
加入我們的行列！ 
準備好為東區注入全新的靈魂與美味了嗎？請將你的中文或英文履歷寄至 june6tea@gmail.com，信件主旨註明：
「應徵全職手搖飲夥伴 \- \[您的姓名]」
我們會迅速審閱每一份履歷。如果合適，預計在 3 天內就會收到我們的通知!
**職缺資訊**
--------


薪資待遇
月薪 36,000 至 40,000 元 (薪資依經驗資歷及績效核薪)
支薪方式
匯款
上班地點
台北市大安區敦化南路一段177巷25號1樓 地圖
\#捷運忠孝敦化站走路3分鐘
上班時段
依公司規定
休假制度
依公司規定
職務類別
飲品調製販售員 、餐飲服務人員
**職缺條件**
--------


工作性質
全職
工作經驗
不拘
需求人數
不拘
可上班日
不限
管理責任
不需負擔管理責任
是否出差
不需出差/外派
**技能條件**
--------


教育程度
不拘
語文條件
中文 聽：精通 / 說：精通 / 讀：精通 / 寫：精通  

英文 聽：中等 / 說：中等 / 讀：中等 / 寫：中等  

**全新功能「技能交換」**
**用你會的，換你想學的技能**
**Anitta**
**擅長** **3** **個技能**
英文


手繪


電腦繪圖


英文家教經驗約10年 多益金 915 全美教學 想找在台中的繪友一起畫聚 最近在玩油畫棒和丙烯筆 咖啡廳或戶外寫生皆可 另徵一起練hiphop腳步的朋友 （我目前學舞2年 想開始好好練基礎）
**Ben單板水肺教練**
**擅長** **18** **個技能**
潛水


滑雪


重量訓練


運動指導與陪練


籃球


法律


水電安裝與維修


英文


創業


潛水教練，單板滑雪教練及健身教練。 想要交換學習「自由潛水」「技術潛水」「進階單板」。 或是有興趣可以一起練習的朋友。
**核音**
**擅長** **8** **個技能**
腳本編寫


APP開發


手機遊戲


電腦應用相關


基本操作技能


網路資訊應用


AI應用技巧


ChatGPT


目前以遊戲直播為主，並持續投入 iOS 直播推流應用開發。 對直播技術、影音串流、AI 輔助開發、內容創作與產品設計有濃厚興趣，持續透過實作累積經驗，也會學習 Godot 遊戲開發等相關技術。 希望透過技能交換認識不同背景的夥伴，交流開發經驗、Side Project、AI 工作流程與職涯發展。
**Leona**
**擅長** **4** **個技能**
中文


手機遊戲


電子競技


寵物飼養


沒什麼技能可以交換，希望
